title: Copper Items Datapack
description: A simple datapack that utilizes Armor Trims for my Spigot plugin
body:
# Overwiev

A simple, effective datapack that utilizes **Armor Trims** - a 1.20 feature, to re-texture armor in Vanilla Minecraft, instead of Optifine CIT, which I used before. If you have any questions or want to help with development, please contact me on my [discord](https://discord.gg/kaB3gntmwT).

# Also

See my other plugins - [Copper Items](https://modrinth.com/plugin/copper-items) (which this datapack is for), [Daggers](https://modrinth.com/plugin/daggers_greefox) and [Katanas](https://modrinth.com/plugin/katanas)!
